zh.of Whittington Castle, Whittington, Shro: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓
zh.Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾利安多福利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan於大約1065年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安多福利時，她的父親Rhys Fychan ap Rhys42歲，母親Mrs. Rhys Vychan38歲。她和Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington至少有8個兒子。

zh-hans.of Whittington Castle, Whittington, Shro: 英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓
zh-hans.Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾利安多福利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan于大约1065年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安多福利时，她的父亲Rhys Fychan ap Rhys42岁，母亲Mrs. Rhys Vychan38岁。她和Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington至少有8个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Vychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Sioned
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan was born about 1065, in Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Rhys Fychan ap Rhys, was 42 and her mother, Mrs. Rhys Vychan, was 38. She had at least 8 sons with Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan est née environ 1065, à Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Rhys Fychan ap Rhys, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Rhys Vychan, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils avec Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan um 1065 in Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys Fychan ap Rhys 42 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Rhys Vychan 38. Sie hatte mit Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington mindestens 8 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan è nata il circa 1065 nel Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Rhys Fychan ap Rhys, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Rhys Vychan, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli con Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington.

ja.lifeSummary: Sioned ferch Rhys Vychanが約1065年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランドベリーで生まれた時，父Rhys Fychan ap Rhysは42歳，母Mrs. Rhys Vychanは38歳であった。彼女はTudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittingtonとの間に少なくとも8人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan(이)가 대략 1065년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜도버리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys Fychan ap Rhys(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Rhys Vychan(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan nasceu aproximadamente 1065, em Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys Fychan ap Rhys, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Rhys Vychan, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos com Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan родилась около 1065 г. в местности лландовири, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Rhys Fychan ap Rhys было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Rhys Vychan, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей от Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan nació aproximadamente 1065, en Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Rhys Fychan ap Rhys, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mrs. Rhys Vychan, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos con Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington.
